description: Doctor fails the test: given an agent with the bl skill doc and a doctor-covered scenario, its existence does not meaningfully raise fix-success. 5/8 checks fail loud already (git/op surfaces them); the 3 silent ones (bin/<name> dangle, protocol drift, blocker cycle) belong at point-of-use as errors naming the fix verb, not in a separate scanning verb an agent must know to run. Doctor's checklist covers KNOWN drift; the weird edge cases agents actually get stuck on are unenumerated, so it helps least where help is most needed. Remove §16 entirely, renumber §17 migration->§16, and scrub all doctor cross-refs (§1 log, §8 op-family reframe, §9 read verbs, §10 cycle, §11 teardown, §12/§14 reframes, §15 changelog refs). No-repair-verb principle already holds without a doctor section.
title: Burn §16 bl doctor out of docs/architecture.md
